cast_and_dedupe.description: Casts source columns to target types and deduplicates rows on a key, keeping the latest row per an ordering column.

params_schema.source_table: string - fully qualified object_id of the single upstream source
params_schema.key_cols: list[string] - columns forming the dedupe key (usually the target's grain)
params_schema.order_col: string - column used to pick the 'latest' row when deduping
params_schema.cast_map: object - {column_name: target_type} for columns that need a type cast
